sources.summary: Leslie Odom Jr. was forced to exit a matinee performance of “Hamilton” in London mid-show Thursday. topics.title: Chris Brown Pleads Guilty in London Nightclub Attack
topics.primaryEntity: Chris Brown: Welcome to My Life

sources.headline: Chris Brown Pleads Guilty in London Nightclub Attack
sources.summary: Singer and co-defendant Omololu “Hoody Baby” Akinlolu face up to three years in prison when sentenced in October

sources.headline: Chris Brown Pleads Guilty After London Nightclub Attack
sources.summary: The singer pleaded guilty to affray, which in the U.K. is a public order offense where the defendant uses or threatens unlawful violence against another person.

sources.headline: Chris Brown Pleads Guilty To Affray Over UK Nightclub Confrontation
sources.summary: Chris Brown has pleaded guilty to affray following a confrontation in a London nightclub in 2023. According to BBC News, the singer entered his plea at Southwark Crown Court in a hearing that took less than five minutes. The incident took place in a London nightclub in Mayfair. Brown s co-defendant, his vocal coach Omololu Akinlolu, [ ]
